entries.title: The AI Glue: Enterprise Tech Consulting in 2026
entries.summary: The 'hyper-growth' era is dead; the market now belongs to 'AI Glue' consultants who can orchestrate agentic workflows and integrate them into legacy systems.

entries.title: The Green Hangover: Hemp & CBD’s Pivot to Pharma
entries.summary: Thailand's 'war on cannabis' marks the end of the unregulated boom, as the global market pivots toward a clinical, beverage-heavy wellness model.

entries.title: The Tolerance Experiment: Amsterdam's Coffeeshop Model at the Crossroads
entries.summary: Fifty years of 'gedoogbeleid' meets EU pharma harmonization — Amsterdam's coffeeshop model is being squeezed between grey-market tradition and clinical-grade futures.

entries.title: The Zoho Ecosystem in 2026: Bootstrapped Giant, Homegrown LLM, and the Deluge Ceiling
entries.summary: Zoho quietly built their own LLM, India just became their #2 market, and the Deluge scripting language is still the ceiling every developer hits — here's what that means for builders and consultants.

entries.title: Agentic AI Systems & Autonomous Agent Frameworks
entries.summary: The framework wars are over. MCP won the protocol layer. And 40% of agentic AI projects are still failing — here's why.
